name: Georgia Institute of Technology-Main Campus
meets_full_need_notes: Georgia Tech does not guarantee to meet full demonstrated financial need for all students. Need-based aid plus state/federal programs may leave unmet need.
no_loan_notes: Loans are standard components of aid packages. No institution-wide no-loan policy.

merit_thresholds.notes: Major merit awards include Stamps President's Scholarship and Gold Scholarship. In-state students often leverage HOPE/Zell Miller. Merit awards highly competitive and often require separate application components.

ed_aid_implications: Georgia Tech does not offer ED. EA applicants considered for merit scholarships and need-based aid with same FAFSA requirements.
appeal_policy: Special Circumstance appeals accepted for significant financial changes. Submit documentation to Office of Scholarships and Financial Aid.
